li.label: <color=#baffe3>Shelter from rain</color>
li.description: Wear rainproof clothing and keep body dry.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Strong Meridians</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was born with stronger meridians than the average person. Their immune speed is slightly higher than that of an ordinary individual.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Weak Meridians</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s meridians are weaker than those of the average person. They have been physically frail since childhood, with an immune speed slightly slower than that of an ordinary person.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Super strength</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} possesses extraordinary physical strength. For someone with excessive energy like them, tasks like throwing boulders or carrying cauldrons are never a challenge.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Scud</color>
li.description: With long and well-developed calf muscles, {PAWN_nameDef} can run faster than most, making them a prime candidate for sprinting competitions.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Herbs hobby</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has been fascinated by various herbs since childhood. This interest has laid a solid foundation for {PAWN_pronoun} in both planting skills and alchemical abilities.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Resist Beating</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is tough as nails. Having endured constant bullying and beatings since childhood, {PAWN_pronoun} has developed a high tolerance for pain over time.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Handsome scholar</color>
li.description: With a face as handsome as a peach blossom, {PAWN_nameDef} naturally stands out wherever {PAWN_pronoun} goes. Not only does {PAWN_pronoun} possess good looks, but {PAWN_pronoun} is also highly skilled in learning and research, making {PAWN_objective} the center of attention.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Withered face</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} experienced a famine in childhood, leaving {PAWN_objective} with permanent dark circles and wrinkles. While {PAWN_pronoun} may appear older than peers, {PAWN_pronoun} has also gained invaluable communication skills from this experience.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Erudite</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} experienced a famine in childhood, leaving {PAWN_objective} with permanent dark circles and wrinkles. While {PAWN_pronoun} may appear older than peers, {PAWN_pronoun} has also gained invaluable communication skills from this experience.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Martial soul</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has shown martial arts talent since childhood. By the age of ten, {PAWN_pronoun} had independently developed a set of practical combat techniques, and {PAWN_pronoun} strength and reflexes surpass those of ordinary individuals.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Emperor</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is well-versed in the ways of an emperor, emitting an aura of majesty without anger.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Divine farmer</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has diligently worked since childhood to feed {PAWN_pronoun} fellow villagers. From a young age, {PAWN_pronoun} has been gathering unknown medicinal herbs and experimenting with them, becoming familiar with various medicinal plants and excelling in farming and cultivation.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Marrow-cleansing spirit body</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s body possesses mysterious power. While practicing cultivation, it seems like spiritual energy automatically washes through {PAWN_pronoun} body repeatedly, greatly enhancing {PAWN_pronoun} absorption efficiency beyond that of ordinary cultivators. Additionally, this nourishes {PAWN_pronoun} flesh, making {PAWN_pronoun} tendons and bones stronger than usual.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Enlightenment of the Dao</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} once had a significant dream. In this dream, {PAWN_pronoun} encountered a blue-robed elder. Upon awakening, {PAWN_nameDef} found many concepts became much easier to comprehend.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Fiery eyes</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} once suffered from an eye ailment, cured by a barefoot doctor. Since then, {PAWN_pronoun} discovered {PAWN_pronoun} vision became extraordinarily sharp, effortlessly hitting targets from a hundred paces.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Human butcher</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s mental processes are different from ordinary individuals; {PAWN_pronoun} feels no remorse for killing. {PAWN_pronoun} is a natural killer, learning various killing techniques and military strategies on {PAWN_pronoun} own without any formal training.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Salvation doctor</color>
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is determined to save life. {PAWN_pronoun} dedicates {PAWN_pronoun} life to the study of medicine, mastering the human body's organs and meridians, and has successfully performed many complex surgeries.

li.label: <color=#8cffd1>Strong spiritual roots</color>
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is good at feeling Qi.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Great spiritual roots</color>
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] can feel more Qi than the average cultivator.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Weak spiritual roots</color>
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] can feel less Qi than the average cultivator.

li.label: <color=#baffe3>Poor spiritual roots</color>
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s body is weak, maybe he is not fit to be a cultivator.
